testcase.name: verifyTokenGeneration

failure.message: Required property is missing: api.email. Provide it using JVM property '-Dapi.email=value', Jenkins environment variable 'API_EMAIL', or config-qa.properties.

testcase.failure: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Required property is missing: api.email. Removed 25 stack frames
